title: LLM-generated docs review report front-matter
description: Shape of the YAML front-matter for a review report under docs/llm-generated/_meta/reviews/. The body of the report (Summary, Items checked, Findings table, optional No-issues notes) is not covered by this schema; it is enforced by the lint pass in regenerate.py.

review_report.description: Sentinel marking the file as a review report.

reviewer_model.description: Identifier of the model that produced the review. Must NOT contain 'claude' or 'anthropic' (case-insensitive); the bookkeeping gate refuses Claude reviewers.

target_doc.description: Manifest key of the reviewed document (e.g. pipeline/05-ir-passes.md).

target_doc_source_commit.description: The source_commit recorded in the reviewed document's front-matter at review time.

target_doc_watched_paths_digest.description: The watched_paths_digest recorded in the reviewed document's front-matter at review time.

source_commit.description: Repository HEAD SHA at the time the review was performed.

severity_breakdown.description: The four counts must sum to finding_count; the lint pass enforces this.
